default_variant.heading: Default variant
default_variant.description: Choose the variant that should be used as the default for this product (e.g. for your storefront).

variant_thickness.heading: Thickness
variant_thickness.description: Set this variant's material thickness in millimeters (stored as metadata.thickness).
variant_thickness.label: Thickness (mm)
variant_thickness.invalid: Please enter a valid, non-negative number.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password – your verification code
password_reset.text:
Hello,

We received a request to reset the password for your account ({email}).

Your verification code is:
{code}

Enter this code in the shop in the “Code” field and set your new password.

If you didn’t request a password reset, you can ignore this email.

Kind regards
{from_name}

bank_settings.bank_info: These bank details will be displayed on the order confirmation email.
